name: Stride Marching Cubes Voxel Terrain
description: GPU Marching Cubes terrain from a compute shader: fill voxel chunks with one of three built-in noise generators (Perlin hills, ridged mountains, 3D caves), mesh them on the GPU with smooth gradient normals, and shade them with a per-surface multi-material colour palette. Drop the VoxelTerrain component in and get a map.
